title: Nether Portal Restrictor
description:
Welcome to Nether Portal Restrictor!

Nether Portal Restrictor was created by Gigabit101 to address an issue in Monumental Experience where Nether portals were being created through various means—such as world generation, portal lighting, and more.
body:
![Header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/NETHER_PORTAL_RESTRICTOR/NETHER_PORTAL_RESTRICTOR_Header.webp) ![Description](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/NETHER_PORTAL_RESTRICTOR/NETHER_PORTAL_RESTRICTOR_Description.webp)

Welcome to Nether Portal Restrictor!

Nether Portal Restrictor was created by Gigabit101 to address an issue in Monumental Experience where Nether portals were being created through various means—such as world generation, portal lighting, and more. This mod prevents unwanted portal creation while still allowing access to the Nether through the Dim Paintings Nether Painting, giving you better control over dimension travel.

![FAQ](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/NETHER_PORTAL_RESTRICTOR/NETHER_PORTAL_RESTRICTOR_Faq.webp) - What does this mod do? This mod disables the ability to light Nether portals and removes or breaks any Nether portals that generate in your world.
